search_to_booking_conversion.definition: Confirmed paid bookings divided by sessions with at least one flight search
search_to_booking_conversion.common_mistake: Using total booking attempts (including abandoned) in numerator. Always filter booking_status = confirmed.

listing_click_rate.definition: Sessions where user clicked at least one flight listing / Total search sessions
listing_click_rate.investigation_note: This is the first major funnel stage drop. Investigate by channel and user segment.

cost_per_booking.definition: Total marketing spend for a channel / Paid bookings attributed to that channel
cost_per_booking.common_mistake: Confusing with cost per install. CPI does not measure booking intent.

net_revenue_per_booking.why_it_matters: More meaningful than GBV when discounts vary. CFO's preferred metric.

session_mix.definition: Share of total sessions attributed to each acquisition channel
session_mix.investigation_note: Key diagnostic metric. If mix shifts toward low-converting channels, aggregate conversion drops even if within-channel performance is stable.

cohort_month1_retention.definition: % of users who acquired in a given month and made another booking in the following month
cohort_month1_retention.why_it_matters: Distinguishes quality of acquisition. Low retention = low-quality cohort.
